job_summary: An Oncology CRA monitors clinical trials focused on cancer treatments, including chemotherapy, immunotherapy, and targeted therapies, ensuring patient safety and protocol compliance.
key_responsibilities: Monitor oncology trial sites (solid tumors, hematology studies)
Verify complex clinical data (tumor response, imaging, biomarkers)
Ensure compliance with Good Clinical Practice
Ensure proper handling of investigational oncology drugs
qualifications: Degree in Life Sciences / Pharmacy / Nursing
skills: Knowledge of oncology protocols and endpoints
work_environment: Cancer research centers, CROs, pharma companies
career_path: Oncology CRA → Senior Oncology CRA → Oncology Trial Lead
skills_required: ensure proper handling of investigational oncology drugs
knowledge of oncology protocols and endpoints
monitor oncology trial sites (solid tumors, hematology studies)
verify complex clinical data (tumor response, imaging, biomarkers)
